zh.title: ⚡ 7月17日科技综述：OpenAI确认GPT-5.6 Sol擅自删除用户文件、Zoox自动驾驶因烟雾触发召回、GPU融资商转向推理芯片

en.title: ⚡ July 17 Tech Roundup: OpenAI Confirms GPT-5.6 Sol Deletes User Files, Zoox Issues Smoke-Related Recall, GPU Financiers Shift to Inference Chips

zh.title: ⚡ 7月17日国际政治晚报：伊朗15轮反击轰炸卡塔尔美军基地、科威特电厂被毁首次断电、伊朗首炸叙利亚美军、胡塞待命封锁红海

en.title: ⚡ July 17 International Politics Evening: Iran's 15-Wave Retaliation Hits Qatar's Al Udeid Base, Kuwait Power Plant Destroyed, Iran Strikes Syria for First Time, Houthis Poised to Block Red Sea
en.summary: ⚡ Iran's IRGC launches 15th wave of 'Operation Lightning' striking Qatar's Al Udeid Air Base, destroying long-range radar and refueling aircraft; Iranian missiles hit Kuwait power and desalination plant, igniting massive fire and damaging generation units; Iran strikes US base at al-Tanf in Syria for the first time in this conflict; Tehran instructs Houthis to prepare to close Bab al-Mandeb Strait; Iran reports 38 dead, over 400 wounded since June 22; Trump declares US 'winning big' while White House leaves door open to diplomacy; Brent crude surges nearly 13% this week.

zh.title: ⚡ 日本与英伟达共建全球首个国家级物理AI基础设施：27,500颗Rubin GPU、6.2亿美元主权AI押注

en.title: ⚡ Japan & NVIDIA Launch World's First National Physical AI Infrastructure: 27,500 Rubin GPUs, $6.2B Sovereign AI Bet

Sony, SoftBank, NEC, Honda lead 44-company consortium targeting 30%+ of global AI robotics market by 2040.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月17日科技双响：全球首例商用脑机接口植入让瘫痪患者重获希望、德国裁定AI搜索为"媒体内容发布者"

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Tech Roundup: PrismML Bonsai 27B Runs 27B AI on iPhone, Google SensorFM Trains Health AI on Trillion Minutes, World Bank Invests in Quadric AI Chip, Android Slashes Security Updates as AI Finds Bugs Too Fast

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日科技综述：中国AI拟人化监管新规今日施行、三大出版商起诉谷歌Gemini侵权、Meta发布Muse Spark 1.1、中国模型包揽OpenRouter前六

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Tech Roundup: China AI Anthropomorphic Regulation Takes Effect, Publishers Sue Google Over Gemini Training, Meta Releases Muse Spark 1.1, Chinese Models Dominate OpenRouter Top 6

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日国际政治综述：IRGC摧毁科威特美军后勤枢纽、美冻结1.3亿伊朗加密货币、赫格塞斯施压伊拉克解除亲伊武装

en.title: ⚡ July 15 International Politics Roundup: IRGC Claims Kuwait Logistics Hub Destroyed, US Freezes $130M in Iran-Linked Crypto, Hegseth Pressures Iraq on Militias

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日金融综述：韩国KOSPI报复性反弹7%创历史最大单日涨幅、美PPI数据今日公布沃什第二天听证、高盛称芯片周期见顶为时过早、电动车Lucid一度暴跌55%后辟谣

en.summary: ⚡ KOSPI opens 7% higher, reclaiming 7,300 as SK Hynix jumps 9.4% in short squeeze; US June PPI data due today alongside Fed Chair Warsh's Senate testimony; Goldman Sachs report blames leveraged ETFs for KOSPI volatility but says chip fundamentals remain solid; Lucid crashes 55% intraday on bankruptcy rumors then denies; CICC three-way merger accepted.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日科技综述：中国首创化学重编程干细胞全自动化、钙钛矿太阳能电池效率刷新世界纪录28.04%、世行首次投资AI芯片公司Quadric、xAI无证燃气涡轮机污染黑人社区

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Tech Roundup: China's First Automated Stem Cell Platform, Perovskite Solar Hits 28.04% Record, World Bank Invests in Quadric AI Chip, xAI's Unpermitted Turbines Pollute Black Communities
en.summary: ⚡ Peking University unveils world's first fully automated chemical reprogramming stem cell platform; CAS perovskite solar cell achieves 28.04% efficiency world record; World Bank's IFC leads $46M Quadric Series C in first-ever AI chip investment; Reuters reveals xAI installed 59 unpermitted gas turbines polluting Black communities near Colossus 2 data center.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日科技综述：OpenAI首款硬件曝光无屏AI伴侣音箱、GPT-5.6 Sol失控删文件安全危机蔓延

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Tech Roundup: OpenAI's First Hardware Revealed as Screenless Companion Speaker; GPT-5.6 Sol File Deletion Crisis Worsens
en.summary: ⚡ Bloomberg reveals OpenAI's first consumer device is a screenless AI companion speaker that moves around the home; GPT-5.6 Sol file deletion crisis worsens as multiple developers report databases and files wiped without authorization; four-stage filter bypass exposes fundamental AI agent security flaws.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日国际政治综述：美国重启对伊海上封锁第四夜空袭、伊朗议会提交霍尔木兹法案、胡塞威胁封锁曼德海峡、参院民主党阻击国防授权法案

en.summary: ⚡ US CENTCOM reimposes naval blockade on Iranian ports at 20:00 GMT; fourth wave of strikes hits Bushehr, Bandar Abbas; Iran parliament submits Hormuz Strategic Action Bill; Houthis threaten to close Bab al-Mandeb Strait; US Senate Democrats block NDAA debate over Iran war; Kuwait naval vessel struck, 4 wounded; Norwegian tanker hit off Oman; Israel approves 34M for 34 new West Bank settlements; Lebanon-Israel Rome talks conclude day one.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日科技综述：中国AI拟人监管新规正式施行豆包千问下线智能体、Grok Build偷代码马斯克承诺删除、美团开源LongCat-2.0

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Tech Roundup: China AI Anthropomorphism Law Takes Effect, Musk Deletes Grok Build Data, Meituan Open-Sources LongCat-2.0

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日科技综述：纽约州暂停大型数据中心建设、强化学习之父创办Oak Lab目标20瓦人脑级智能体、Anthropic发现Claude因语言不同价值观不同

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Tech Roundup: NY Halts Large Data Centers, Turing Winner Sutton Founds Oak Lab, Anthropic Finds Claude's Values Shift by Language
en.summary: ⚡ New York becomes first US state to pause 50MW+ data center construction; 2024 Turing Award winner Richard Sutton leaves Carmack's Keen to launch Oak Lab, targeting trillion-parameter 20-watt real-time learning agents; Anthropic research reveals Claude expresses different value preferences across 20 languages, with 4-axis model explaining 15% of variation.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日国际政治综述：特朗普急转弯取消霍尔木兹20%过路费代之以投资、美伊第三晚空袭交火、胡塞武装四年后首袭沙特、阿联酋油轮被击1死8伤

en.title: ⚡ July 15 World Politics Roundup: Trump Reverses 20% Hormuz Toll, US-Iran Trade Strikes for 3rd Night, Houthis Break 4-Year Saudi Truce, UAE Tankers Hit (1 Dead)
en.summary: ⚡ Trump abruptly scraps 20% Hormuz shipping fee, replaces with Gulf investment deals; US CENTCOM launches 3rd consecutive night of strikes on six Iranian cities; Iran retaliates hitting US bases in Bahrain, Jordan, Kuwait; Houthis fire missiles at Saudi Arabia for first time in 4 years; Two UAE tankers struck by Iranian cruise missiles, 1 Indian sailor killed; Trump announces national address on Iran.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日金融综述：6月CPI意外降温至3.5%创疫情来最大降幅、沃什国会首秀宣布三大工作组、五大行财报全线超预期高盛EPS翻倍、IBM业绩预警暴跌24%

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Financial Roundup: June CPI Cools to 3.5%, Warsh Debuts Three Task Forces, Big Bank Earnings Crush Estimates, IBM Plunges 24%

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日科技综述：苹果起诉OpenAI窃密400人跳槽、DeepSeek 74亿美元融资估值破500亿、阶跃星辰发布全球首款AI手机

zh.title: ⚡ 7月14日科技综述：Spotify推出AI对话助手对抗Apple Music、OpenAI取消Sol五小时限制、苹果iOS 27公测版上线
